control_boundary.prompt_only: commercial_case_only; forbids Run 2.12 thick evidence, Run 2.10 aesthetic shell inputs, skill workflow, and trace contract
control_boundary.run1_5_skill: commercial_case_plus_run1_5_only; forbids Run 2.12 thick evidence, Run 2.10 aesthetic shell inputs, skill workflow, and trace contract
control_boundary.bad_visible_workflow_memory: run2_12_data_workflow_without_run2_10_aesthetic_shell; allows thick evidence, design memory seed, and workflow gate seed, but forbids Run 2.10 visual-system sources, memory, and gate matrix

aesthetic_trace_learning: 2.10 visual system aesthetic shell is now reused as an explicit full-arm input instead of being treated as a lost older style.
2.13 thick data trace core remains present through Run 2.12 evidence, memory, workflow gate ids, and actual code module ids.
manifest_only_trace_public_surface keeps workflow evidence in trace_manifest.json and viewer metadata rather than visible slide machinery.
workflow_hidden_from_slide_surface is the key visual correction: the deck presents editorial composition while QA keeps the proof chain inspectable.
The bad visible-workflow control shows that Run 2.12 data/workflow without the Run 2.10 aesthetic shell still collapses toward beige boxes and checklist rhythm.

qa_summary.trace_truthfulness_guard: passed: full arm trace records actual native Run 2.14 module calls from rendered slide metrics
qa_summary.layout_budget_guard: passed for all Run 2.14 full-arm slides
qa_summary.html_viewer_check: passed: latestRunId is 2.14 and viewer registers prompt-only, Run 1.5, full, and bad visible-workflow arms
qa_summary.gemini_artifact_review: passed with caveats: Gemini judged Run 2.14 full as recovering the Run 2.10 editorial shell and hiding raw workflow machinery, but flagged dynamic text-length fragility and diagnostic-loss risk

not_public_ready_reasons: The deck is presentation-first again, but the editorial layouts are still partly hardcoded and may be fragile under long or unpredictable user content.
No human release approval has been recorded.
The product surface still needs stronger layout module selection, typography resilience, and real product/demo image handling before public-video-grade release.
next_required_action: continue the same five-layer loop by turning Run 2.14 aesthetic recovery into reusable layout-module selection, stronger typography/spacing constraints, and robust product-theater components; do not advance to Run 3.0 yet.
